name: super-quiz-mongodb-app
description: Aplicación full-stack de cuestionarios interactivos con React, Node.js y MongoDB
author: Pablo Machado

scripts.postinstall: echo 'Run npm run setup to configure the project'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && echo 'No lint configured for backend'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git add docs && git commit -m "chore: deploy docs to GitHub Pages" && git push origin main
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules && rm -rf frontend/dist
